flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Missouri-Columbia rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.4k → $36.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Missouri-Columbia rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($7.3k → $8.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Missouri-Columbia fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Missouri-Columbia are 30% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($63.4k vs $48.7k).
